mapper.sql: ( CASE WHEN (SELECT CDCATE3 FROM MCODEM WHERE COMCDKY = 'ITEMCOD' AND COMCDVL = #{param.itemcod}) = 'PLATE' THEN ( SELECT BA.ADDCOKY FROM BADDCO BA WHERE ((BA.MINLENG = 0 OR BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) AND (BA.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{param.skuleng} < BA.MAXLENG)) AND ( CASE WHEN (SELECT ORWIDYN FROM BTRCAT WHERE BTRCATE = #{param.btrcate}) = 'Y' THEN (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.grosswd}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.grosswd} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.grosswd}) ELSE (BA.MINWIDT = 0 OR BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) AND (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.skuwidt} < BA.MAXWIDT) OR (BA.MAXLENG = 0 AND BA.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) OR (BA.MAXWIDT = 0 AND BA.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) END ) AND BA.SYSCDYN = 'N' ) ELSE ( SELECT BAD.ADDCOKY FROM BADDCO BAD WHERE BAD.SYSCDYN = 'Y' ) END )

(SELECT MG.SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG WHERE ((MG.MINLENG = 0 OR MG.MINLENG <= #{param.skuleng}) AND (MG.MAXLENG = 0 OR #{param.skuleng} < MG.MAXLENG)) AND((MG.MINWIDT = 0 OR MG.MINWIDT <= #{param.skuwidt}) AND (MG.MAXWIDT = 0 OR #{param.skuwidt} < MG.MAXWIDT)) AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y')
mapper.select: /* selectShpplky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPPLKY() AS SHPPLKY FROM DUAL
/* selectShpplit */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPPLIT(#{param.shpplky}) AS SHPPLIT FROM DUAL
/* selectShpdcky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPDCKY() AS SHPDCKY FROM DUAL
/* selectShpdcit */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPDCIT(#{shpdcky}) AS SHPDCIT FROM DUAL

/* selectTargetStockListForAddStock */ SELECT
CONCAT(WS.STOCKKY) AS ROWKEY,
WS.STOCKKY,
WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER, WS.SAVEPNT, WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.OWNRNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.FNCUSKY, WS.FCNAMLC, WS.SKUGRKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC, WS.STLOTNB, WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSTH, WS.BTRCATE, WS.BTRFSTC, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN, WS.REGIKEY, WS.DESTKEY, WS.REGIORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTORG, WS.DEORGNM, WS.DESTMOD, WS.ITEMCOD, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMODYN, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMDTLN, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY, WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.POSHPDT, WS.POSHPTM, WS.POSHPDY, WS.SHPLIMT, WS.DELVDSR, WS.STKMEMO, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT,
MR1.RENAMLC AS REORGNM, MR2.RENAMLC AS REMODNM, MW.WHNAMLC AS WHNAMLC, MA.AREANAM AS AREANAM, ML.LOCANAM AS LOCANAM, MCO1.COMCDTX AS STKSTNM, WR.RCVDCDT, WR.RCVDCTM, MC02.COMCDTX AS ADDCONM, (SELECT M.GRPKYNM FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA M WHERE M.SKUGRKY = WS.SKUGRKY) AS GRPKYNM, BTC.BTRCNAM,
DATE_FORMAT(WS.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WS.CRETIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME, ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WS.CREUSER) AS CREUSER, DATE_FORMAT(WS.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WS.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME, ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WS.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MAREMA MA ON MA.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND MA.AREAKEY = WS.AREAKEY AND MA.ARUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MLOCMA ML ON ML.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND ML.AREAKEY = WS.AREAKEY AND ML.LOCAKEY = WS.LOCAKEY AND ML.LOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCO1 ON MCO1.COMCDVL = WS.STKSTAT AND MCO1.COMCDKY = 'STKSTAT' AND MCO1.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR1 ON MR1.REGIKEY = WS.REGIORG AND MR1.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR2 ON MR2.REGIKEY = WS.REGIMOD AND MR2.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BA ON BA.ADDCOKY = WS.ADDCOKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC02 ON BA.ADDSIKY = MC02.COMCDVL AND MC02.COMCDKY = 'ADDSIKY' AND MC02.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MP ON MP.SKUGRKY = WS.SKUGRKY LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.WRCVIT WR ON WR.RCVDCKY = WS.RCVDCKY AND WR.RCVDCIT = WS.RCVDCIT AND WR.SKUMKEY = WS.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT BTC ON BTC.BTRCATE = WS.BTRCATE WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOTQTY > 0 AND WS.SALLQTY = 0 AND WS.SBLOQTY = 0 AND WS.PLANQTY = 0 AND WS.PLCMQTY = 0 AND WS.TASKQTY = 0 AND WS.STKSTAT = '00' AND ML.LOCTYPE = 'BED'
AND WS.REGIMOD = #{param.regikey}
AND WS.DESTMOD = #{param.destkey}
AND WS.OWNERKY = #{param.ownerky}
AND WS.SKUGRKY IN ( SELECT SKUGRKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA WHERE SZGUBUN >= (SELECT SZGUBUN FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA WHERE SKUGRKY = #{param.skugrky} ) )
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.DEMODNM)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.denamlc})), '%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.DEMDADR)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.desaddr})), '%')
GROUP BY WS.STOCKKY,
WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER, WS.SAVEPNT, WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.OWNRNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.FNCUSKY, WS.FCNAMLC, WS.SKUGRKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC, WS.STLOTNB, WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSTH, WS.BTRCATE, WS.BTRFSTC, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN, WS.REGIKEY, WS.DESTKEY, WS.REGIORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTORG, WS.DEORGNM, WS.DESTMOD, WS.ITEMCOD, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMODYN, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMDTLN, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY, WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.POSHPDT, WS.POSHPTM, WS.POSHPDY, WS.SHPLIMT, WS.DELVDSR, WS.STKMEMO, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, MR1.RENAMLC, MR2.RENAMLC,
MW.WHNAMLC, MA.AREANAM, ML.LOCANAM, MCO1.COMCDTX, WR.RCVDCDT, WR.RCVDCTM, MC02.COMCDTX, MP.GRPKYNM,
WS.CREDATE, WS.CRETIME, WS.CREUSER, WS.LMODATE, WS.LMOTIME, WS.LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK ORDER BY WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER DESC

/* selectStockListForAddStockToInvoice */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY , WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY , WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY , WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD , WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH , WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.RCVDCTM , WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03 , WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO , WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT , WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT , WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT , WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT , WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC , WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDTLN , WS.DEMODYN , WS.CREDATE , WS.CRETIME , WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE , WS.LMOTIME , WS.LMOUSER , WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOTQTY > 0 AND WS.SALLQTY = 0 AND WS.SBLOQTY = 0 AND WS.PLANQTY = 0 AND WS.PLCMQTY = 0 AND WS.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} GROUP BY WS.STOCKKY , WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY , WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY , WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD , WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH , WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.RCVDCTM , WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03 , WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO , WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT , WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT , WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT , WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT , WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC , WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDTLN , WS.DEMODYN , WS.CREDATE , WS.CRETIME , WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE , WS.LMOTIME , WS.LMOUSER , WS.UPDTCHK

/* selectStockListForUpdate */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY , WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY , WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY , WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD , WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH , WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.RCVDCTM , WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03 , WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO , WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT , WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT , WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT , WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT , WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC , WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDTLN , WS.DEMODYN , WS.CREDATE , WS.CRETIME , WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE , WS.LMOTIME , WS.LMOUSER , WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.AREAKEY = #{param.areakey} AND WS.LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey} AND WS.LOLAYER > #{param.lolayer} GROUP BY WS.STOCKKY , WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY , WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY , WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD , WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD, WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH , WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM, WS.ORDERLN , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.RCVDCTM , WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03 , WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO , WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT , WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT , WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT , WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT , WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC , WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDTLN , WS.DEMODYN , WS.CREDATE , WS.CRETIME , WS.CREUSER , WS.LMODATE , WS.LMOTIME , WS.LMOUSER , WS.UPDTCHK

/* selectTargetStockListForChangeInvoice */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY as ROWKEY, WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY, WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG , WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC, WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD , WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH, WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM , WS.ORDERLN, WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.PLCMQTY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY , DATE_FORMAT(WS.RCVDCDT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RCVDCDT , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WS.RCVDCTM, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS RCVDCTM , WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02, WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID , WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO, WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY , WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY, WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT , WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT, WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC , WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD, WS.DEMDTLN, WS.DEMODYN , WS.SHPLIMT, WS.DELVDSR , WS.POSHPDT, WS.POSHPTM, WS.POSHPDY
, MW.WHNAMLC, MA.AREANAM, ML.LOCANAM, MCO1.COMCDTX AS STATNAM, (SELECT M.GRPKYNM FROM ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA M WHERE M.SKUGRKY = WS.SKUGRKY) AS GRPKYNM , BT.BTRCNAM, MCO2.COMCDTX AS ADDCONM, MR1.RENAMLC AS REORGNM, MR2.RENAMLC AS REMODNM , IF((WS.OWNERKY IS NULL OR TRIM(WS.OWNERKY) = ''), WS.OWNRNAM, MCU1.CUNAMLC) AS OWNRNAM , IF((WS.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WS.CUSTCOD) = ''), WS.CUSTNAM, MCU2.CUNAMLC) AS CUSTNAM , IF((WS.DESTORG IS NULL OR TRIM(WS.DESTORG) = ''), WS.DEORGNM, MD1.DENAMLC) AS DEORGNM , IF((WS.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WS.DESTMOD) = ''), WS.DEMODNM, MD2.DENAMLC) AS DEMODNM
, DATE_FORMAT(WS.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WS.CRETIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WS.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(WS.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WS.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WS.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MAREMA MA ON MA.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND MA.AREAKEY = WS.AREAKEY AND MA.ARUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MLOCMA ML ON ML.WAREKEY = WS.WAREKEY AND ML.AREAKEY = WS.AREAKEY AND ML.LOCAKEY = WS.LOCAKEY AND ML.LOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCO1 ON MCO1.COMCDVL = WS.STKSTAT AND MCO1.COMCDKY = 'STKSTAT' AND MCO1.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR1 ON MR1.REGIKEY = WS.REGIORG AND MR1.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR2 ON MR2.REGIKEY = WS.REGIMOD AND MR2.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT BT ON BT.BTRCATE = WS.BTRCATE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BA ON BA.ADDCOKY = WS.ADDCOKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCO2 ON MCO2.COMCDKY = 'ADDSIKY' AND MCO2.COMCDVL = BA.ADDSIKY AND MCO2.COUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU1 ON MCU1.CUSTKEY = WS.OWNERKY AND MCU1.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU2 ON MCU2.CUSTKEY = WS.CUSTCOD AND MCU2.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MD1 ON MD1.CUSTKEY = WS.OWNERKY AND MD1.REGIKEY = WS.REGIORG AND MD1.DESTKEY = WS.DESTORG AND MD1.DEUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MD2 ON MD2.CUSTKEY = WS.OWNERKY AND MD2.REGIKEY = WS.REGIMOD AND MD2.DESTKEY = WS.DESTMOD AND MD2.DEUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.WRCVIT WRI ON WRI.RCVDCKY = WS.RCVDCKY AND WRI.RCVDCIT = WS.RCVDCIT WHERE WS.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WS.STOTQTY > 0 AND WS.SALLQTY = 0 AND WS.SBLOQTY = 0 AND WS.PLANQTY = 0 AND WS.PLCMQTY = 0 AND WS.TASKQTY = 0 AND WS.STKSTAT = '00' AND (WS.CUSTNAM, WS.REGIMOD, WS.DEMODNM, WS.DEMDADR) IN ( SELECT CUSTNAM, REGIMOD, DEMODNM, DEMDADR FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} GROUP BY CUSTNAM, REGIMOD, DEMODNM, DEMDADR )
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.SKUMKEY)) IN
UPPER(TRIM(#{skumkey}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.SKUMKEY)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.skumkey})), '%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.PURCNUM)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.purcnum})), '%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.ORDERLN)) IN
UPPER(TRIM(#{orderln}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(WS.ORDERLN)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.orderln})), '%')
GROUP BY WS.STOCKKY, WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER , WS.LOTNMKY, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUGRKY, WS.REGIORG, WS.DESTORG , WS.REGIMOD, WS.DESTMOD, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.SKUDESC, WS.SKUWEIG , WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUTHIC, WS.GROSSWG, WS.GROSSWD , WS.GROSSLN, WS.GROSSTH, WS.BTRCATE, WS.STLOTNB, WS.PURCNUM , WS.ORDERLN, WS.ITEMCOD, WS.STOTQTY, WS.SALLQTY, WS.SBLOQTY , WS.PLCMQTY , WS.SHPLIMT, WS.DELVDSR , WS.POSHPDT, WS.POSHPTM, WS.POSHPDY , WS.SUOMKEY, WS.ADDCOKY, WS.RCVDCDT, WS.RCVDCTM, WS.LOTAT01, WS.LOTAT02 , WS.LOTAT03, WS.STKSTAT, WS.BLOCKID, WS.EMSKUYN, WS.STKMEMO , WS.RCVDCKY, WS.RCVDCIT, WS.ADJSOKY, WS.ADJSOIT, WS.PHYSOKY , WS.PHYSOIT, WS.SHPDCKY, WS.SHPDCIT, WS.TASKOKY, WS.TASKOIT , WS.CUSTCOD, WS.DEMDMAN, WS.FCNAMLC, WS.DEMDADR, WS.DEMPOCD , WS.DEMDTLN, WS.DEMODYN, MW.WHNAMLC, MA.AREANAM, ML.LOCANAM , MCO1.COMCDTX, BT.BTRCNAM, MCO2.COMCDTX, MR1.RENAMLC , MR2.RENAMLC, WS.OWNRNAM, WS.CUSTNAM, WS.DEORGNM, WS.DEMODNM , WS.CREDATE, WS.CRETIME, WS.CREUSER, WS.LMODATE, WS.LMOTIME , WS.LMOUSER, WS.UPDTCHK ORDER BY WS.WAREKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER DESC
mapper.insert:
/* saveDoe045Wplnit */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WPLNIT(
SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT,
WPLITST, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, STOCKKY, REGIORG, DESTORG, SKUGRKY, REGIMOD, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, DESTMOD, DEMDMAN, DEORGNM, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, TPRILOC, SPRILOC, EMSKUYN, STKMEMO, CHKDISP, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSTH, GROSSWG, PLANQTY, SUOMKEY, ITEMCOD, STLOTNB, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, BTRCATE, ADDCOKY, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{param.shpplky}, #{param.shpplit},
#{param.wplitst}, #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.warekey}, #{stock.poshpdt}, #{stock.poshptm}, #{stock.poshpdy}, #{stock.ownerky}, #{stock.ownrnam}, #{stock.stockky}, #{stock.regiorg}, #{stock.destorg}, #{stock.skugrky}, #{stock.regimod}, #{stock.custcod}, #{stock.custnam}, #{stock.fcnamlc}, #{stock.destmod}, #{stock.demdman}, #{stock.deorgnm}, #{stock.demodnm}, #{stock.demodyn}, #{stock.demdadr}, #{stock.dempocd}, #{stock.demdtln}, #{stock.skumkey}, #{stock.skudesc}, #{param.tpriloc}, #{param.spriloc}, #{stock.emskuyn}, #{stock.stkmemo}, #{param.chkdisp}, #{stock.skuweig}, #{stock.skuwidt}, #{stock.skuleng}, #{stock.skuthic}, #{stock.grosswd}, #{stock.grossln}, #{stock.grossth}, #{stock.grosswg}, #{param.planqty}, #{stock.suomkey}, #{stock.itemcod}, #{stock.stlotnb}, #{stock.purcnum}, #{stock.orderln}, #{stock.shplimt}, #{stock.delvdsr}, #{stock.btrfstc}, #{stock.btrcate}, #{stock.addcoky}, #{stock.rcvdcdt}, #{stock.rcvdctm}, #{stock.rcvdcky}, #{stock.rcvdcit},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )

/* insertWplnitForAddStock */
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WPLNIT(
SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT,
WPLITST, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, STOCKKY, REGIORG, DESTORG, SKUGRKY, REGIMOD, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, DESTMOD, DEMDMAN, DEORGNM, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, TPRILOC, SPRILOC, EMSKUYN, STKMEMO, CHKDISP, SKUWEIG, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUTHIC, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSTH, GROSSWG, PLANQTY, SUOMKEY, ITEMCOD, STLOTNB, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, BTRCATE, ADDCOKY, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{param.shpplky}, ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPPLIT(#{param.shpplky}),
'ING', #{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.warekey}, #{stock.poshpdt}, #{stock.poshptm}, #{stock.poshpdy}, #{stock.ownerky}, #{stock.ownrnam}, #{stock.stockky}, #{stock.regiorg}, #{stock.destorg}, #{stock.skugrky}, #{stock.regimod}, #{stock.custcod}, #{stock.custnam}, #{stock.fcnamlc}, #{stock.destmod}, #{stock.demdman}, #{stock.deorgnm}, #{stock.demodnm}, #{stock.demodyn}, #{stock.demdadr}, #{stock.dempocd}, #{stock.demdtln}, #{stock.skumkey}, #{stock.skudesc}, #{param.tpriloc}, #{param.spriloc}, #{stock.emskuyn}, #{stock.stkmemo}, 'Y', #{stock.skuweig}, #{stock.skuwidt}, #{stock.skuleng}, #{stock.skuthic}, #{stock.grosswd}, #{stock.grossln}, #{stock.grossth}, #{stock.grosswg}, 1, #{stock.suomkey}, #{stock.itemcod}, #{stock.stlotnb}, #{stock.purcnum}, #{stock.orderln}, #{stock.shplimt}, #{stock.delvdsr}, #{stock.btrfstc}, #{stock.btrcate}, #{stock.addcoky}, #{stock.rcvdcdt}, #{stock.rcvdctm}, #{stock.rcvdcky}, #{stock.rcvdcit},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* selectWplnhdList */ SELECT
CONCAT(WPH.SHPPLKY) AS ROWKEY,
WPH.SHPPLKY,
WPH.WAREKEY, WPH.OWNERKY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.DESTKEY, WPH.DENAMLC, WPH.DESADDR, WPH.SHPWEIG, WPH.REMWEIG, WPH.SKUGRKY, WPH.WPLDATE, WPH.WPLTIME, WPH.DOCCATE, WPH.DOCTYPE, WPH.WPLSTAT, WPH.RSNCODE, WPH.PARSNNM,
DATE_FORMAT(WPH.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPH.CRETIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME, ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WPH.CREUSER) AS CREUSER, DATE_FORMAT(WPH.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPH.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s'), '%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME, ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(WPH.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER, WPH.UPDTCHK,
MW.WHNAMLC, MDC1.DOCCTNM, MDC1.DOCTYNM, MCD1.COMCDTX AS WPLSTNM, MGR.GRPKYNM FROM ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD WPH INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WPH.WAREKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDOCMA MDC1 ON MDC1.WAREKEY = WPH.WAREKEY AND MDC1.DOCCATE = WPH.DOCCATE AND MDC1.DOCTYPE = WPH.DOCTYPE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCD1 ON MCD1.COMCDKY = 'WPLSTAT' AND MCD1.COMCDVL = WPH.WPLSTAT INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MGR ON MGR.SKUGRKY = WPH.SKUGRKY LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNIT WPI ON WPI.SHPPLKY = WPH.SHPPLKY
AND WPH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
AND UPPER(TRIM(WPI.SKUMKEY)) IN
UPPER(TRIM(#{skumkey}))
AND (UPPER(TRIM(WPI.SKUMKEY)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.skumkey})), '%') OR ((TRIM(#{param.skumkey}) = '') AND WPI.SKUMKEY IS NULL))
AND UPPER(TRIM(WPH.SHPPLKY)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.shpplky})),'%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPH.WPLDATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{param.wpldateFrom}
AND DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPH.WPLDATE, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{param.wpldateTo}
AND WPH.REGIKEY IN
#{regikey}
AND UPPER(TRIM(WPI.DEMODNM)) LIKE CONCAT('%',UPPER(TRIM(#{param.demodnm})),'%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(WPI.ORDERLN)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.orderln})), '%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(WPI.ORDERLN)) IN
UPPER(TRIM(#{orderln}))
AND (UPPER(TRIM(WPI.ORDERLN)) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(TRIM(#{param.orderln})), '%') OR (TRIM(#{param.orderln}) = '') AND WPI.ORDERLN IS NULL)
AND DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPI.SHPLIMT, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{param.shplimtFrom}
AND DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WPI.SHPLIMT, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{param.shplimtTo}
GROUP BY
WPH.SHPPLKY,
WPH.WAREKEY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.SHPWEIG, WPH.REMWEIG, WPH.SKUGRKY, WPH.WPLDATE, WPH.WPLTIME, WPH.DOCCATE, WPH.DOCTYPE, WPH.WPLSTAT, WPH.RSNCODE, WPH.PARSNNM,
WPH.CREDATE, WPH.CRETIME, WPH.CREUSER, WPH.LMODATE, WPH.LMOTIME, WPH.LMOUSER, WPH.UPDTCHK,
MW.WHNAMLC, MDC1.DOCCTNM, MDC1.DOCTYNM, MCD1.COMCDTX, MGR.GRPKYNM ORDER BY WPH.SHPPLKY DESC

/* selectFullDispatchedOutboundPlanItemList */ SELECT TPI.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC, TPI.VHPLNKY, TPI.VHPLNIT, TPI.SHPPLKY , TPI.CUSTCOD , CASE WHEN TPI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TPI.CUSTCOD) = '' THEN TPI.CUSTNAM WHEN MCU.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MCU.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN TPI.CUSTNAM ELSE MCU.CUNAMLC END AS CUSTNAM , TPI.TPISTAT, MC1.COMCDTX AS TPISTNM , TPI.OWNERKY, TPI.OWNRNAM, TPI.SKUMKEY, TPI.SKUDESC , TPI.OBITQTY, TPI.TRITQTY, TPI.REGIMOD, MR.RENAMLC AS RENAMLC , TPI.REGIORG, MRO.RENAMLC AS RONAMLC , TPI.DESTORG , CASE WHEN TPI.DESTORG IS NULL OR TRIM(TPI.DESTORG) = '' THEN TPI.DEORGNM WHEN MDO.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDO.DENAMLC) = '' THEN TPI.DEORGNM ELSE MDO.DENAMLC END AS DEORGNM , TPI.DESTMOD , CASE WHEN TPI.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TPI.DESTMOD) = '' THEN TPI.DEMODNM WHEN MDM.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDM.DENAMLC) = '' THEN TPI.DEMODNM ELSE MDM.DENAMLC END AS DEMODNM , TPI.ITEMCOD, TPI.SKUGRKY, MG.GRPKYNM , TPI.SKUTHIC, TPI.SKUWIDT, TPI.SKULENG, TPI.SKUWEIG , TPI.STKMEMO, MC2.COMCDTX AS ADDCOKY, TPI.BTRCATE, BT.BTRCNAM , TPI.PURCNUM, TPI.ORDERLN, TPI.SUOMKEY, TWG.SHPPLKY, TWG.WPLCFYN , TPI.EMSKUYN, TPI.BTRFSTC, MC2.COMCDTX AS ADDCNAM , TPI.SHPLIMT, TPI.DELVDSR , WPI.RCVDCKY, WPI.RCVDCIT, WPI.RCVDCDT, WPI.RCVDCTM , DATE_FORMAT(TPI.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , CASE WHEN TPI.CRETIME IS NULL OR TPI.CRETIME = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TPI.CRETIME, '%H%i%s') END AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TPI.CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(TPI.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , CASE WHEN TPI.LMOTIME IS NULL OR TPI.LMOTIME = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TPI.LMOTIME, '%H%i%s') END AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TPI.LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , TPI.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.TPLNIT TPI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG TWG ON TPI.VHPLNKY = TWG.VHPLNKY AND TPI.SHPPLKY = TWG.SHPPLKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD AS TPH ON TPH.VHPLNKY = TPI.VHPLNKY AND TPH.WAREKEY = TPI.WAREKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD AS WPH ON TWG.SHPPLKY = WPH.SHPPLKY AND WPH.WAREKEY = WPH.WAREKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON TPI.WAREKEY = MW.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC1 ON TPI.TPISTAT = MC1.COMCDVL AND MC1.COMCDKY = 'TPISTAT' AND MC1.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG ON TPI.SKUGRKY = MG.SKUGRKY AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BA ON TPI.ADDCOKY = BA.ADDCOKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MC2 ON MC2.COMCDKY = 'ADDSIKY' AND MC2.COMCDVL = BA.ADDSIKY AND MC2.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT BT ON BT.BTRCATE = TPI.BTRCATE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRO ON MRO.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIORG AND MRO.REUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON MCU.CUSTKEY = TPI.CUSTCOD AND MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MDO ON MDO.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIORG AND MDO.CUSTKEY = TPI.OWNERKY AND MDO.DESTKEY = TPI.DESTORG LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MDM ON MDM.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIMOD AND MDM.CUSTKEY = TPI.OWNERKY AND MDM.DESTKEY = TPI.DESTMOD LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNIT AS WPI ON TPI.SHPPLKY = WPI.SHPPLKY AND TPI.SHPPLIT = WPI.SHPPLIT AND TPI.WAREKEY = WPI.WAREKEY AND TPI.SKUMKEY = WPI.SKUMKEY WHERE TPH.APROVYN = 'APPROVAL' AND WPH.WPLSTAT IN ('ING', 'CMP') AND TPH.TPNSTAT = 'PLAN' AND WPH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TWG.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND TWG.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TWG.PLNSIZE = #{param.plnsize} GROUP BY TPI.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC, TPI.VHPLNKY, TPI.SHPPLKY, TPI.CUSTCOD, TPI.CUSTNAM, MCU.CUNAMLC, TPI.TPISTAT, MC1.COMCDTX, TPI.OWNERKY, TPI.OWNRNAM, TPI.SKUMKEY, TPI.SKUDESC, TPI.OBITQTY, TPI.TRITQTY, TPI.REGIMOD, MR.RENAMLC, TPI.REGIORG, MRO.RENAMLC, TPI.DESTORG, TPI.DEORGNM, MDO.DENAMLC, TPI.DESTMOD, TPI.DEMODNM, MDM.DENAMLC, TPI.ITEMCOD, TPI.SKUGRKY, MG.GRPKYNM, TPI.SKUTHIC, TPI.SKUWIDT, TPI.SKULENG, TPI.SKUWEIG, TPI.STKMEMO, MC2.COMCDTX, TPI.BTRCATE, BT.BTRCNAM, TPI.PURCNUM, TPI.ORDERLN, TPI.SUOMKEY, TPI.SHPPLKY, TWG.WPLCFYN, TPI.EMSKUYN, TPI.BTRFSTC, TPI.SHPLIMT, TPI.DELVDSR, WPI.RCVDCKY, WPI.RCVDCIT, WPI.RCVDCDT, WPI.RCVDCTM, TPI.CREDATE, TPI.CRETIME, TPI.CREUSER, TPI.LMODATE, TPI.LMOTIME, TPI.LMOUSER, TPI.UPDTCHK

/* selectWshphdListForVerification */ SELECT
SHPDCKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, VHPLNKY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, SHPDCST, REGIKEY, ALSTRKY, ALSTRIT, PARSNCD, PARSNNM, SHPWEIG, WPLNDAT, WPLNTIM, OBODATE, OBOTIME, SHPSDAY, SHPSTIM, SPEHDAT, SPEHTIM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPHD WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} GROUP BY
SHPDCKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, VHPLNKY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, SHPDCST, REGIKEY, ALSTRKY, ALSTRIT, PARSNCD, PARSNNM, SHPWEIG, WPLNDAT, WPLNTIM, OBODATE, OBOTIME, SHPSDAY, SHPSTIM, SPEHDAT, SPEHTIM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK

/* selectWshpitListForVerification */ SELECT SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPITST, OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SPEIDAT, SPEITIM, BTRCATE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER, SHLOCKY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, ITEMCOD, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, OBOMEMO, ALLGRKY, RGITQTY, SHALQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, STKMEMO, EMSKUYN, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, STKSTAT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} GROUP BY SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPITST, OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SPEIDAT, SPEITIM, BTRCATE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER, SHLOCKY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, ITEMCOD, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, OBOMEMO, ALLGRKY, RGITQTY, SHALQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, ADDCOKY, STKMEMO, EMSKUYN, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, STKSTAT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK

/* selectWshpitListForVerificationItem */ SELECT WSI.SHPDCKY, WSI.SHPDCIT, WSI.DOCCATE, WSI.DOCTYPE, WSI.WAREKEY, WSI.POSHPDT, WSI.POSHPTM, WSI.POSHPDY, WSI.SHPITST, WSI.OUTBOKY, WSI.OUTBOIT, WSI.OUBRQDT, WSI.OUBRQTM, WSI.SPEIDAT, WSI.SPEITIM, WSI.BTRCATE, WSI.OWNERKY, WSI.OWNRNAM, WSI.CUSTCOD, WSI.CUSTNAM, WSI.FNCUSKY, WSI.SKUGRKY, WSI.SKUMKEY, WSI.SKUDESC, WSI.SKUTHIC, WSI.SKUWIDT, WSI.SKULENG, WSI.SKUWEIG, WSI.GROSSWD, WSI.GROSSLN, WSI.GROSSWG, WSI.GROSSTH, WSI.FRAREKY, WSI.FRLOCKY, WSI.FRLAYER, WSI.SHLOCKY, WSI.REGIORG, MRE1.RENAMLC AS REORGNM, WSI.REGIMOD, MRE2.RENAMLC AS REMODNM, WSI.DESTORG, WSI.DEORGNM, WSI.DESTMOD, WSI.DEMODNM, WSI.DEMODYN, WSI.DEMDMAN, WSI.DEMDADR, WSI.DEMDTLN, WSI.DEMPOCD, WSI.PURCNUM, WSI.ORDERLN, WSI.ITEMCOD, WSI.SHPLIMT, WSI.DELVDSR, WSI.BTRFSTC, WSI.OBOMEMO, WSI.ALLGRKY, WSI.RGITQTY, WSI.SHALQTY, WSI.SHCFQTY, WSI.SUOMKEY, WSI.ADDCOKY, WSI.STKMEMO, WSI.EMSKUYN, WSI.LOTAT01, WSI.LOTAT02, WSI.LOTAT03, WSI.STKSTAT, WSI.RCVDCKY, WSI.RCVDCIT, WSI.RCVDCDT, WSI.RCVDCTM, WSI.CREDATE, WSI.CRETIME, WSI.CREUSER, WSI.LMODATE, WSI.LMOTIME, WSI.LMOUSER, WSI.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WSI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRE1 ON WSI.REGIORG = MRE1.REGIKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRE2 ON WSI.REGIMOD = MRE2.REGIKEY WHERE WSI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WSI.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND WSI.SHPDCIT = #{param.shpdcit} GROUP BY WSI.SHPDCKY, WSI.SHPDCIT, WSI.DOCCATE, WSI.DOCTYPE, WSI.WAREKEY, WSI.POSHPDT, WSI.POSHPTM, WSI.POSHPDY, WSI.SHPITST, WSI.OUTBOKY, WSI.OUTBOIT, WSI.OUBRQDT, WSI.OUBRQTM, WSI.SPEIDAT, WSI.SPEITIM, WSI.BTRCATE, WSI.OWNERKY, WSI.OWNRNAM, WSI.CUSTCOD, WSI.CUSTNAM, WSI.FNCUSKY, WSI.SKUGRKY, WSI.SKUMKEY, WSI.SKUDESC, WSI.SKUTHIC, WSI.SKUWIDT, WSI.SKULENG, WSI.SKUWEIG, WSI.GROSSWD, WSI.GROSSLN, WSI.GROSSWG, WSI.GROSSTH, WSI.FRAREKY, WSI.FRLOCKY, WSI.FRLAYER, WSI.SHLOCKY, WSI.REGIORG, MRE1.RENAMLC, WSI.REGIMOD, MRE2.RENAMLC, WSI.DESTORG, WSI.DEORGNM, WSI.DESTMOD, WSI.DEMODNM, WSI.DEMODYN, WSI.DEMDMAN, WSI.DEMDADR, WSI.DEMDTLN, WSI.DEMPOCD, WSI.PURCNUM, WSI.ORDERLN, WSI.ITEMCOD, WSI.SHPLIMT, WSI.DELVDSR, WSI.BTRFSTC, WSI.OBOMEMO, WSI.ALLGRKY, WSI.RGITQTY, WSI.SHALQTY, WSI.SHCFQTY, WSI.SUOMKEY, WSI.ADDCOKY, WSI.STKMEMO, WSI.EMSKUYN, WSI.LOTAT01, WSI.LOTAT02, WSI.LOTAT03, WSI.STKSTAT, WSI.RCVDCKY, WSI.RCVDCIT, WSI.RCVDCDT, WSI.RCVDCTM, WSI.CREDATE, WSI.CRETIME, WSI.CREUSER, WSI.LMODATE, WSI.LMOTIME, WSI.LMOUSER, WSI.UPDTCHK
mapper.update:
/* updateWstkkyAlloc */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY SET
SALLQTY = 1,
SALLQTY = 0,
PLCMQTY = 1,
PLCMQTY = 0,
PLANQTY = 1,
PLANQTY = 0,
LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = (SELECT UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}) + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND UPDTCHK = (SELECT UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND STOCKKY = #{param.stockky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey})
mapper.select: /* getShpplkyList */ SELECT TPW.SHPPLKY FROM ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG TPW INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD WP ON WP.SHPPLKY = TPW.SHPPLKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TP ON TP.VHPLNKY = TPW.VHPLNKY WHERE WP.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TPW.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}
/* selectOutboky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_OUTBOKY() as OUTBOKY FROM DUAL
/* selectOutboky */ SELECT ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_OUTBOIT(#{param.outboky}) as OUTBOIT FROM DUAL

/* selectOoubhdListForApi */ SELECT
OBH.OUTBOKY,
TPH.TPRILOC, TPH.SPRILOC, MEQ1.EQUIPKY, MVH.VHCFNAM, OBH.VEHICKY FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBHD OBH INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TPH ON( OBH.VHPLNKY = TPH.VHPLNKY ) INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MVH ON( MVH.VOWNKEY = TPH.VOWNKEY AND MVH.VEHICKY = TPH.VEHICKY ) INNER JOIN ( SELECT M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.LOCAKEY, M2.LOCTYPE FROM ${userData.schema}.MEQLOC M1 INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MLOCMA M2 ON ( M1.WAREKEY = M2.WAREKEY AND M1.AREAKEY = M2.AREAKEY AND M1.LOCAKEY = M2.LOCAKEY ) INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MEQUMA M3 ON( M1.WAREKEY = M3.WAREKEY AND M1.AREAKEY = M3.AREAKEY AND M1.EQUIPKY = M3.EQUIPKY ) WHERE M1.ELUSEYN = 'Y' AND M2.LOCTYPE = 'STP' AND M2.LOUSEYN = 'Y' AND M3.EQUSEYN = 'Y' AND M3.EQUSTAT = 'NORMAL' GROUP BY M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.LOCAKEY, M2.LOCTYPE ORDER BY M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.LOCAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.MANEQYN DESC ) AS MEQ1 ON( MEQ1.WAREKEY = TPH.WAREKEY AND MEQ1.LOCAKEY = TPH.TPRILOC ) WHERE OBH.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND MVH.VEHICKY = TPH.VEHICKY AND MVH.VOWNKEY = TPH.VOWNKEY GROUP BY
OBH.OUTBOKY,
TPH.TPRILOC, TPH.SPRILOC, MEQ1.EQUIPKY, MVH.VHCFNAM, OBH.VEHICKY LIMIT 1

/* selectOoubitListForApi */ SELECT
OBI.OUTBOKY, OBI.OUTBOIT,
OBI.DOCCATE, OBI.DOCTYPE, OBI.WAREKEY, OBI.POSHPDT, OBI.POSHPTM, OBI.POSHPDY, OBI.OWNERKY, OBI.OWNRNAM, OBI.CUSTCOD, OBI.CUSTNAM, OBI.FNCUSKY, OBI.REGIORG, OBI.DESTORG, OBI.REGIMOD, OBI.DESTMOD, OBI.DEORGNM, OBI.DEMODNM, OBI.DEMODYN, OBI.DEMDMAN, OBI.DEMDADR, OBI.DEMPOCD, OBI.DEMDTLN, OBI.OBOMEMO, OBI.OUBRQDT, OBI.OUBRQTM, OBI.SKUGRKY, OBI.SKUMKEY, OBI.SKUDESC, OBI.SKUWEIG, OBI.SKUWIDT, OBI.SKULENG, OBI.SKUTHIC, OBI.GROSSWG, OBI.GROSSWD, OBI.GROSSLN, OBI.GROSSTH, OBI.FRAREKY, OBI.FRLOCKY, OBI.FRLAYER, OBI.SHLOCKY, OBI.RGITQTY, OBI.SHCFQTY, OBI.SUOMKEY, OBI.SHPPLKY, OBI.SHPPLIT, OBI.VHPLNKY, OBI.VHPLNIT, OBI.PLNSIZE, OBI.OBOITST, OBI.ITEMCOD, OBI.PURCNUM, OBI.ORDERLN, OBI.STLOTNB, OBI.SHPLIMT, OBI.DELVDSR, OBI.BTRFSTC, OBI.PARSNCD, OBI.PARSNNM, OBI.BTRCATE, OBI.ADDCOKY,
TPH.TPRILOC, TPH.SPRILOC, MEQ1.EQUIPKY, MVH.VHCFNAM, OBH.VEHICKY,
OBI.CREDATE, OBI.CRETIME, OBI.CREUSER, OBI.LMODATE, OBI.LMOTIME, OBI.LMOUSER, OBI.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT OBI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.OOUBHD OBH ON( OBH.OUTBOKY = OBI.OUTBOKY ) INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TPH ON( OBI.VHPLNKY = TPH.VHPLNKY ) INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MVH INNER JOIN ( SELECT M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.LOCAKEY, M2.LOCTYPE FROM ${userData.schema}.MEQLOC M1 INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MLOCMA M2 ON ( M1.WAREKEY = M2.WAREKEY AND M1.AREAKEY = M2.AREAKEY AND M1.LOCAKEY = M2.LOCAKEY ) INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MEQUMA M3 ON( M1.WAREKEY = M3.WAREKEY AND M1.AREAKEY = M3.AREAKEY AND M1.EQUIPKY = M3.EQUIPKY ) WHERE M1.ELUSEYN = 'Y' AND M2.LOCTYPE = 'STP' AND M2.LOUSEYN = 'Y' AND M3.EQUSEYN = 'Y' AND M3.EQUSTAT = 'NORMAL' GROUP BY M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.LOCAKEY, M2.LOCTYPE ORDER BY M1.WAREKEY, M1.AREAKEY, M1.LOCAKEY, M1.EQUIPKY, M1.MANEQYN DESC ) AS MEQ1 ON( MEQ1.WAREKEY = TPH.WAREKEY AND MEQ1.LOCAKEY = TPH.TPRILOC ) WHERE OBI.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND MVH.VEHICKY = TPH.VEHICKY AND MVH.VOWNKEY = TPH.VOWNKEY GROUP BY
OBI.OUTBOKY, OBI.WAREKEY,
TPH.TPRILOC, TPH.SPRILOC, MEQ1.EQUIPKY, MVH.VHCFNAM, OBH.VEHICKY LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
/* saveDoe049Wshpit */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT (
SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT,
DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPITST, OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SPEIDAT, SPEITIM, BTRCATE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER, SHLOCKY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, STLOTNB, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, ITEMCOD, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, OBOMEMO, ALLGRKY, RGITQTY, SHALQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, STLAYER, STKMEMO, ADDCOKY, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, STKSTAT, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES(
#{param.shpdcky}, #{param.shpdcit},
#{param.doccate}, #{param.doctype}, #{param.warekey}, #{param.poshpdt}, #{param.poshptm}, #{param.poshpdy}, #{param.shpitst}, #{param.outboky}, #{param.outboit}, #{param.oubrqdt}, #{param.oubrqtm}, ' ', ' ', #{stock.btrcate}, #{stock.ownerky}, #{stock.ownrnam}, #{stock.custcod}, #{stock.custnam}, #{stock.fncusky}, #{stock.skugrky}, #{stock.skumkey}, #{stock.skudesc}, #{stock.skuthic}, #{stock.skuwidt}, #{stock.skuleng}, #{stock.skuweig}, #{stock.grosswd}, #{stock.grossln}, #{stock.grosswg}, #{stock.grossth}, #{param.frareky}, #{param.frlocky}, #{param.frlayer}, #{param.shlocky}, #{stock.regiorg}, #{stock.regimod}, #{stock.destorg}, #{stock.deorgnm}, #{stock.destmod}, #{stock.demodnm}, #{stock.demodyn}, #{stock.demdman}, #{stock.demdadr}, #{stock.dempocd}, #{stock.demdtln}, #{stock.stlotnb}, #{stock.purcnum}, #{stock.orderln}, #{stock.itemcod}, REPLACE(#{param.shplimt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{param.delvdsr},'-',''), #{stock.btrfstc}, #{param.obomemo}, #{param.allgrky}, #{param.rgitqty}, #{param.shalqty}, #{param.shcfqty}, #{stock.suomkey}, #{stock.stlayer}, #{stock.stkmemo}, #{stock.addcoky}, #{stock.lotat01}, #{stock.lotat02}, #{stock.lotat03}, #{stock.stkstat}, #{stock.rcvdcdt}, #{stock.rcvdctm}, #{stock.rcvdcky}, #{stock.rcvdcit},
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract}, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), #{userData.useract} )
mapper.update: /* updateShpdcst */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSHPHD SET SHPDCST = #{param.shpdcst}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND SHPDCST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateOoucfyn */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG SET OOUCFYN = #{param.ooucfyn}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}
mapper.select:
/* selectDoe053ModalHeadList */ SELECT
OBH.OUTBOKY,
OBH.WAREKEY, OBH.DOCCATE, OBH.DOCTYPE, OBH.VHPLNKY, OBH.VOWNKEY, OBH.VEHICKY, OBH.RSNCODE, OBH.PARSNNM, OBH.TPRILOC AS TRLOCML, OBH.SPRILOC AS SRLOCML, TWG.ALCWEIG AS ALCWEIG, OBH.OBODATE, OBH.OBOTIME, OBH.OBOSTAT, DATE_FORMAT(OBH.ENTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS ENTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(OBH.ENTTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS ENTTIME, DATE_FORMAT(OBH.EXTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS EXTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(OBH.EXTTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS EXTTIME
, DATE_FORMAT(OBH.CREDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(OBH.CRETIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(OBH.CREUSER) , DATE_FORMAT(OBH.LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(OBH.LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(OBH.LMOUSER), OBH.UPDTCHK
, TWG.SHPPLKY, WPH.OWNERKY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.DESTKEY , WPH.DENAMLC, WPH.DESADDR, WPH.SHPWEIG, WPH.REMWEIG , MGM.GRPKYNM, MVO.VONAMLC, MVC.VHCFNAM , MWM.WHNAMLC, TPH.CORWEIG AS VHCMAXW, MDC.DOCCTNM, MDC.DOCTYNM , MRC.RSNCDNM, TWG.PLNSIZE, MCU.CUNAMLC AS OWNRNAM , MRG.RENAMLC FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBHD OBH INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MWM ON MWM.WAREKEY = OBH.WAREKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG TWG ON OBH.VHPLNKY = TWG.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TPH ON OBH.WAREKEY = TPH.WAREKEY AND OBH.VHPLNKY = TPH.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MVC ON MVC.VOWNKEY = OBH.VOWNKEY AND MVC.VEHICKY = OBH.VEHICKY AND MVC.VHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MVO ON MVO.VOWNKEY = OBH.VOWNKEY AND MVO.VOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD WPH ON TWG.SHPPLKY = WPH.SHPPLKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRG ON WPH.REGIKEY = MRG.REGIKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDOCMA MDC ON MDC.WAREKEY = OBH.WAREKEY AND OBH.DOCCATE = MDC.DOCCATE AND OBH.DOCTYPE = MDC.DOCTYPE AND MDC.DOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MGM ON MGM.SKUGRKY = TWG.PLNSIZE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MRSCMA MRC ON MRC.WAREKEY = OBH.WAREKEY AND MRC.DOCCATE = OBH.DOCCATE AND MRC.DOCTYPE = OBH.DOCTYPE AND MRC.RSNCODE = OBH.RSNCODE AND MRC.RSUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON MCU.CUSTKEY = WPH.OWNERKY WHERE OBH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND OBH.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} GROUP BY OBH.OUTBOKY,
OBH.WAREKEY, OBH.DOCCATE, OBH.DOCTYPE, OBH.VHPLNKY, OBH.VOWNKEY, OBH.VEHICKY, OBH.RSNCODE, OBH.PARSNNM, OBH.TPRILOC, OBH.SPRILOC, TWG.ALCWEIG, OBH.OBODATE, OBH.OBOTIME, OBH.OBOSTAT, OBH.ENTDATE, OBH.ENTTIME, OBH.EXTDATE, OBH.EXTTIME,
OBH.CREDATE, OBH.CRETIME, OBH.CREUSER, OBH.LMODATE, OBH.LMOTIME, OBH.LMOUSER, OBH.UPDTCHK
, TWG.SHPPLKY, WPH.OWNERKY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.DESTKEY , WPH.DENAMLC, WPH.DESADDR, WPH.SHPWEIG, WPH.REMWEIG , MGM.GRPKYNM, MVO.VONAMLC, MVC.VHCFNAM , MWM.WHNAMLC, TPH.VHCMAXW, MDC.DOCCTNM, MDC.DOCTYNM , MRC.RSNCDNM, TWG.PLNSIZE, MCU.CUNAMLC , MRG.RENAMLC

/* selectDoe053ModalItemList */ SELECT
TWG.VHPLNKY, TWG.SHPPLKY, TWG.PLNSIZE,
TWG.ALCWEIG, TWG.REGIKEY, TPI.WAREKEY, TPI.VHPLNKY, TPI.VHPLNIT, TPI.CUSTCOD, TPI.CUSTNAM, TPI.DESTORD, TPI.TPISTAT, TPI.PLNSIZE, TPI.OWNERKY, TPI.OWNRNAM, TPI.SKUMKEY, TPI.SKUDESC, TPI.OBITQTY, TPI.TRITQTY, TPI.REGIORG, TPI.REGIMOD, TPI.DESTORG, TPI.DEORGNM, TPI.DESTMOD, TPI.DEMODNM, TPI.DEMDMAN, TPI.DEMPOCD, TPI.DEMDADR, TPI.DEMDTLN, TPI.ITEMCOD, TPI.SKUGRKY, TPI.SKUTHIC, TPI.SKUWIDT, TPI.SKULENG, TPI.SKUWEIG, TPI.GROSSWD, TPI.GROSSLN, TPI.GROSSTH, TPI.STKMEMO, TPI.GROSSWG, TPI.ADDCOKY, TPI.BTRCATE, TPI.PURCNUM, TPI.ORDERLN, TPI.SHPLIMT, TPI.DELVDSR, TPI.BTRFSTC, TPI.SUOMKEY, TPI.EMSKUYN, TPI.EOASNKY, TPI.EOASNIT, TPI.SHPPLKY, TPI.SHPPLIT, TPI.BILDATE, TPI.TRNCPDT, TPI.TRNCPTM, TPI.POSHPDT, TPI.POSHPTM, TPI.POSHPDY,
TPH.VHCMAXW, WPH.OWNERKY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.DESTKEY, WPH.DENAMLC, WPH.DESADDR, WPH.SHPWEIG, MRG1.RENAMLC AS RGORGNM, MRG2.RENAMLC AS RGMODNM, MGP.GRPKYNM AS GRPKYNM, BTC.BTRCNAM AS BTRCNAM, MD3.COMCDTX AS ADDCNAM, WST.RCVDCDT, WST.RCVDCTM, WST.RCVDCKY, WST.RCVDCIT,
${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TPI.CREUSER), DATE_FORMAT(TPI.LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(TPI.LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME, ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(TPI.LMOUSER), TPI.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG TWG INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TPH ON TPH.VHPLNKY = TWG.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.TPLNIT TPI ON TPH.WAREKEY = TPI.WAREKEY AND TPI.VHPLNKY = TWG.VHPLNKY AND TPI.SHPPLKY = TWG.SHPPLKY AND TPI.PLNSIZE = TWG.PLNSIZE INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRG1 ON MRG1.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIORG INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MRG2 ON MRG2.REGIKEY = TPI.REGIMOD INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MGP ON MGP.SKUGRKY = TPI.SKUGRKY LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD WPH ON TPH.WAREKEY = WPH.WAREKEY AND WPH.SHPPLKY = TWG.SHPPLKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WST ON WST.SKUMKEY = TPI.SKUMKEY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BTRCAT BTC ON BTC.BTRCATE = TPI.BTRCATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MCJ.COMCDTX, BC.ADDCOKY FROM ${userData.schema}.MCODEM MCJ INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.BADDCO BC ON BC.ADDSIKY = MCJ.COMCDVL ) AS MD3 ON MD3.ADDCOKY = TPI.ADDCOKY WHERE TWG.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TPH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WPH.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} GROUP BY TWG.VHPLNKY, TWG.SHPPLKY, TWG.PLNSIZE,
TWG.ALCWEIG, TWG.REGIKEY, TPI.WAREKEY, TPI.VHPLNKY, TPI.VHPLNIT, TPI.CUSTCOD, TPI.CUSTNAM, TPI.DESTORD, TPI.TPISTAT, TPI.PLNSIZE, TPI.OWNERKY, TPI.OWNRNAM, TPI.SKUMKEY, TPI.SKUDESC, TPI.OBITQTY, TPI.TRITQTY, TPI.REGIORG, TPI.REGIMOD, TPI.DESTORG, TPI.DEORGNM, TPI.DESTMOD, TPI.DEMODNM, TPI.DEMDMAN, TPI.DEMPOCD, TPI.DEMDADR, TPI.DEMDTLN, TPI.ITEMCOD, TPI.SKUGRKY, TPI.SKUTHIC, TPI.SKUWIDT, TPI.SKULENG, TPI.SKUWEIG, TPI.GROSSWD, TPI.GROSSLN, TPI.GROSSTH, TPI.STKMEMO, TPI.GROSSWG, TPI.ADDCOKY, TPI.BTRCATE, TPI.PURCNUM, TPI.ORDERLN, TPI.SHPLIMT, TPI.DELVDSR, TPI.BTRFSTC, TPI.SUOMKEY, TPI.EMSKUYN, TPI.EOASNKY, TPI.EOASNIT, TPI.SHPPLKY, TPI.SHPPLIT, TPI.BILDATE, TPI.TRNCPDT, TPI.TRNCPTM, TPI.POSHPDT, TPI.POSHPTM, TPI.POSHPDY,
TPH.VHCMAXW, WPH.OWNERKY, WPH.REGIKEY, WPH.DESTKEY, WPH.DENAMLC, WPH.DESADDR, WPH.SHPWEIG, MRG1.RENAMLC, MRG2.RENAMLC, MGP.GRPKYNM, WST.RCVDCDT, WST.RCVDCTM, WST.RCVDCKY, WST.RCVDCIT,
TPI.CREUSER, TPI.LMODATE, TPI.LMOTIME, TPI.LMOUSER, TPI.UPDTCHK

/* getOoubitShlockyGroupList */ SELECT OOU.OUTBOKY, OOU.OUTBOIT, WSH.SHPDCKY, WSH.SHPDCIT , OOU.DOCCATE, OOU.DOCTYPE , OOU.WAREKEY, OOU.POSHPDT, OOU.POSHPTM, OOU.POSHPDY , OOU.OWNERKY, OOU.OWNRNAM, OOU.CUSTCOD, OOU.CUSTNAM , OOU.FNCUSKY, OOU.REGIORG, OOU.DESTORG, OOU.REGIMOD , OOU.DESTMOD, OOU.DEORGNM, OOU.DEMODNM, OOU.DEMODYN , OOU.DEMDMAN, OOU.DEMDADR, OOU.DEMPOCD, OOU.DEMDTLN , OOU.OBOMEMO, OOU.OUBRQDT, OOU.OUBRQTM, OOU.SKUGRKY , OOU.SKUMKEY, OOU.SKUDESC, OOU.SKUWEIG, OOU.SKUWIDT , OOU.SKULENG, OOU.SKUTHIC, OOU.GROSSWG, OOU.GROSSWD , OOU.GROSSLN, OOU.GROSSTH, OOU.FRAREKY, OOU.FRLOCKY , OOU.FRLAYER, OOU.SHLOCKY, OOU.EQUIPKY, OOU.RGITQTY, OOU.SHCFQTY , OOU.SUOMKEY, OOU.SHPPLKY, OOU.SHPPLIT, OOU.VHPLNKY, OOU.VHPLNIT , OOU.PLNSIZE, OOU.OBOITST, OOU.ITEMCOD, OOU.PURCNUM, OOU.ORDERLN , OOU.STLOTNB, OOU.SHPLIMT, OOU.DELVDSR, OOU.BTRFSTC , OOU.BTRCATE, OOU.ADDCOKY , OOU.PARSNCD, OOU.PARSNNM, OOU.CREDATE, OOU.CRETIME, OOU.CREUSER , OOU.LMODATE, OOU.LMOTIME, OOU.LMOUSER, OOU.UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT OOU INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WSH ON WSH.OUTBOKY = OOU.OUTBOKY AND WSH.OUTBOIT = OOU.OUTBOIT WHERE OOU.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND OOU.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND OOU.SHLOCKY = #{param.shlocky} ORDER BY OOU.FRAREKY, OOU.FRLOCKY, OOU.FRLAYER DESC
mapper.update: /* updateDoe056ShpDate */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT SET SPEIDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), SPEITIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), SHCFQTY = 1, STLAYER = #{param.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND SHPDCIT = #{param.shpdcit}
mapper.select: /* getDoe056UllockyStlayer */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(STLAYER), 0) AS STLAYER FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WHERE SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky}
mapper.update: /* updateTpwpwgShpcfyn */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG SET SHPCFYN = #{param.shpcfyn}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE (VHPLNKY, SHPPLKY, PLNSIZE) IN ( SELECT O.VHPLNKY, O.SHPPLKY, O.PLNSIZE FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT O INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT W ON W.WAREKEY = O.WAREKEY AND W.OUTBOKY = O.OUTBOKY AND W.OUTBOIT = O.OUTBOIT WHERE W.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND W.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} )
mapper.select: /* checkShipmentCompletionStatus */ SELECT TP.SHPPLKY FROM ${userData.schema}.TPWPWG TP INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD WP ON WP.SHPPLKY = TP.SHPPLKY WHERE TP.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TP.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND TP.WPLCFYN = 'Y' AND TP.OOUCFYN = 'Y' AND TP.SHPCFYN = 'Y' AND WP.REMWEIG = 0 GROUP BY TP.SHPPLKY
mapper.update: /* updateWplnhdStat */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WPLNHD SET WPLSTAT = #{param.wplstat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND WPLSTAT != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWplnitStat */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WPLNIT SET WPLITST = #{param.wplitst}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND WPLITST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateOboitstCMP */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT SET OBOITST = #{param.oboitst}, SHCFQTY = 1, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky}
AND OUTBOIT = #{param.outboit}

/* updateOboitstCmpToWshpit */
UPDATE ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT SET OBOITST = #{status}, SHCFQTY = 1, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{data.warekey} AND OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky} AND OUTBOIT = #{data.outboit}

/* updateObostatCMP */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.OOUBHD SET OBOSTAT = #{param.obostat}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND OBOSTAT != 'CANCEL'

/* updateShpdcstCMP */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSHPHD SET SHPDCST = #{param.shpdcst}, SPEHDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), SPEHTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND SHPDCST != 'CANCEL'

/* updateWshpitForChangeInvoice */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT SET POSHPDT = #{param.poshpdt}, POSHPTM = #{param.poshptm}, POSHPDY = #{param.poshpdy}, BTRCATE = #{param.btrcate}, OWNERKY = #{param.ownerky}, OWNRNAM = #{param.ownrnam}, CUSTCOD = #{param.custcod}, CUSTNAM = #{param.custnam}, FNCUSKY = #{param.fncusky}, SKUGRKY = #{param.skugrky}, SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey}, SKUDESC = #{param.skudesc}, SKUTHIC = #{param.skuthic}, SKUWIDT = #{param.skuwidt}, SKULENG = #{param.skuleng}, SKUWEIG = #{param.skuweig}, GROSSWD = #{param.grosswd}, GROSSLN = #{param.grossln}, GROSSWG = #{param.grosswg}, GROSSTH = #{param.grossth}, FRAREKY = #{param.frareky}, FRLOCKY = #{param.frlocky}, FRLAYER = #{param.frlayer}, SHLOCKY = #{param.shlocky}, REGIORG = #{param.regiorg}, REGIMOD = #{param.regimod}, DESTORG = #{param.destorg}, DEORGNM = #{param.deorgnm}, DESTMOD = #{param.destmod}, DEMODNM = #{param.demodnm}, DEMODYN = #{param.demodyn}, DEMDMAN = #{param.demdman}, DEMDADR = #{param.demdadr}, DEMPOCD = #{param.dempocd}, DEMDTLN = #{param.demdtln}, STLOTNB = #{param.stlotnb}, PURCNUM = #{param.purcnum}, ORDERLN = #{param.orderln}, ITEMCOD = #{param.itemcod}, SHPLIMT = #{param.shplimt}, DELVDSR = #{param.delvdsr}, BTRFSTC = #{param.btrfstc}, ADDCOKY = #{param.addcoky}, SUOMKEY = #{param.suomkey}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND SHPDCIT = #{param.shpdcit}
mapper.select: /* selectOoubitCountValidationList */ SELECT COUNT(OUTBOKY) FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND OBOITST = 'ING' GROUP BY WAREKEY, OUTBOKY

/* selectTplnitCountValidationList */ SELECT COUNT(VHPLNKY) FROM ${userData.schema}.TPLNIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND VHPLNKY IN( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} GROUP BY VHPLNKY ) AND TPISTAT = 'PLAN' GROUP BY WAREKEY, VHPLNKY
mapper.update: /* updateTransportPlanHeaderStatus */ UPDATE ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD SET TPNSTAT = #{status}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TPNSTAT = 'PLAN'

/* updateTransportPlanItemStatus */
UPDATE ${userData.schema}.TPLNIT SET TPISTAT = #{status}, BILDATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{userData.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WAREKEY = #{data.warekey} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey} AND VHPLNKY = ( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${userData.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{data.outboky} AND OUTBOIT = #{data.outboit} GROUP BY VHPLNKY ) AND TPISTAT = 'PLAN'
mapper.select: /* selectEquipListForTask */ SELECT A.WAREKEY, A.AREAKEY, A.EQUIPKY, A.LOCAKEY, A.MANEQYN, A.ELUSEYN, B.EQUSTAT FROM ${userData.schema}.MEQLOC A INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MEQUMA B ON( A.WAREKEY = B.WAREKEY AND A.AREAKEY = B.AREAKEY AND A.EQUIPKY = B.EQUIPKY ) WHERE A.ELUSEYN = 'Y' AND B.EQUSEYN = 'Y' AND B.EQUSTAT = 'NORMAL' AND A.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND A.AREAKEY = #{param.areakey} AND A.LOCAKEY = #{param.locakey} GROUP BY A.WAREKEY, A.AREAKEY, A.EQUIPKY, A.LOCAKEY, A.MANEQYN, A.ELUSEYN, B.EQUSTAT ORDER BY A.MANEQYN DESC
mapper.insert:
/* insertWshpitForChangeInvoice */ INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT(
SHPDCKY, SHPDCIT,
DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, WAREKEY, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, SHPITST, OUTBOKY, OUTBOIT, OUBRQDT, OUBRQTM, SPEIDAT, SPEITIM, BTRCATE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, FNCUSKY, SKUGRKY, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSWG, GROSSTH, FRAREKY, FRLOCKY, FRLAYER, SHLOCKY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMODYN, DEMDMAN, DEMDADR, DEMPOCD, DEMDTLN, STLOTNB, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, ITEMCOD, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, OBOMEMO, ALLGRKY, RGITQTY, SHALQTY, SHCFQTY, SUOMKEY, STLAYER, EMSKUYN, STKMEMO, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, STKSTAT, ADDCOKY, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) SELECT
#{param.shpdcky} AS SHPDCKY, ${userData.schema}.FN_OM_SHPDCIT(#{param.shpdcky}) AS SHPDCIT,
#{param.doccate} AS DOCCATE, #{param.doctype} AS DOCTYPE, WST.WAREKEY, WST.POSHPDT, WST.POSHPTM, WST.POSHPDY, 'CMP' AS SHPITST, ' ' AS OUTBOKY, 0 AS OUTBOIT, ' ' AS OUBRQDT, ' ' AS OUBRQTM, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS SPEIDAT, date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') AS SPEITIM, WST.BTRCATE, WST.OWNERKY, WST.OWNRNAM, WST.CUSTCOD, WST.CUSTNAM, WST.FNCUSKY, WST.SKUGRKY, WST.SKUMKEY, WST.SKUDESC, WST.SKUTHIC, WST.SKUWIDT, WST.SKULENG, WST.SKUWEIG, WST.GROSSWD, WST.GROSSLN, WST.GROSSWG, WST.GROSSTH, WST.AREAKEY, WST.LOCAKEY, WST.LOLAYER, ' ' AS SHLOCKY, WST.REGIORG, WST.REGIMOD, WST.DESTORG, WST.DEORGNM, WST.DESTMOD, WST.DEMODNM, WST.DEMODYN, WST.DEMDMAN, WST.DEMDADR, WST.DEMPOCD, WST.DEMDTLN, WST.STLOTNB, WST.PURCNUM, WST.ORDERLN, WST.ITEMCOD, WST.SHPLIMT, WST.DELVDSR, WST.BTRFSTC, '출고송장수정' AS OBOMEMO, ' ' AS ALLGRKY, 1 AS RGITQTY, 1 AS SHALQTY, 1 AS SHCFQTY, WST.SUOMKEY, 0 AS STLAYER, WST.EMSKUYN, WST.STKMEMO, WST.LOTAT01, WST.LOTAT02, WST.LOTAT03, WST.STKSTAT, WST.ADDCOKY, WST.RCVDCDT, WST.RCVDCTM, WST.RCVDCKY, WST.RCVDCIT,
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS CREDATE, date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') AS CRETIME, #{userData.useract} AS CREUSER, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS LMODATE, date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') AS LMOTIME, #{userData.useract} AS LMOUSER FROM ${userData.schema}.WSTKKY WST WHERE WST.WAREKEY = #{sku.warekey} AND WST.SKUMKEY = #{sku.skumkey}
mapper.select: /*selectTplnitListByDoe049 */ SELECT TI.VHPLNKY, TI.VHPLNIT, TI.CUSTCOD, TI.CUSTNAM , TI.TPISTAT, TI.PLNSIZE, TI.OWNERKY, TI.OWNRNAM , TI.SKUMKEY, TI.OBITQTY, TI.TRITQTY, TI.REGIORG , TI.REGIMOD, TI.DESTORG, TI.DEORGNM, TI.DESTMOD , TI.DEMODNM, TI.DEMDMAN, TI.DEMPOCD, TI.DEMDADR , TI.DEMDTLN, TI.ITEMCOD, TI.SKUGRKY, TI.SKUTHIC , TI.SKUWIDT, TI.SKULENG, TI.SKUWEIG, TI.GROSSWD , TI.GROSSLN, TI.GROSSTH, TI.STKMEMO, TI.GROSSWG , TI.PURCNUM, TI.ORDERLN, TI.BTRCATE, TI.SHPPLKY , TI.SHPPLIT FROM ${userData.schema}.TPLNIT TI WHERE TI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TI.SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND TI.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND TI.SHPPLIT = #{param.shpplit} AND TI.TPISTAT != 'CANCEL'

/* selectTplnhdForVerification */ SELECT TPH.WAREKEY, TPH.VHPLNKY, TPH.VOWNKEY, TPH.VEHICKY , TPH.VHCMAXW , TPH.DRVERNM , TPH.DRVERPH , TPH.DOCCATE , TPH.DOCTYPE , TPH.LOADKEY , TPH.TPNSTAT , TPH.TPRILOC , TPH.SPRILOC , TPH.TRNMEMO , TPH.MIXCUYN , TPH.VHPDATE , TPH.VHPTIME , TPH.STPITDT , TPH.STPITTM , TPH.TRNINDT , TPH.CREUSER , TPH.CREDATE , TPH.CRETIME , TPH.LMOUSER , TPH.LMODATE , TPH.LMOTIME , TPH.UPDTCHK , TPH.APROVYN , TPH.APROVDT , TPH.APROVTM FROM ${userData.schema}.TPLNHD TPH WHERE TPH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND TPH.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}

/* selectOmLocationList */ SELECT ML.LOCAKEY , ML.LOCANAM , ML.LOCSTAT , ML.LOCTYPE FROM ${userInfo.schema}.MLOCMA ML WHERE ML.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND ML.LOCTYPE = 'STP' AND ML.LOUSEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ML.WAREKEY, ML.AREAKEY, ML.LOCAKEY

/* selectTransportPlanStat */ SELECT TPH.VHPLNKY , TPH.TPNSTAT FROM ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNHD TPH WHERE TPH.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND (TPH.VHPLNKY) IN ( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${userInfo.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} )
mapper.insert:
/* insertTplnitForChangeInvoice */ INSERT INTO ${userInfo.schema}.TPLNIT(
WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, VHPLNIT,
CUSTCOD, CUSTNAM, DESTORD, TPISTAT, PLNSIZE, OWNERKY, OWNRNAM, SKUMKEY, SKUDESC, OBITQTY, TRITQTY, REGIORG, REGIMOD, DESTORG, DEORGNM, DESTMOD, DEMODNM, DEMDMAN, DEMPOCD, DEMDADR, DEMDTLN, ITEMCOD, SKUGRKY, SKUTHIC, SKUWIDT, SKULENG, SKUWEIG, GROSSWD, GROSSLN, GROSSTH, STKMEMO, GROSSWG, ADDCOKY, BTRCATE, PURCNUM, ORDERLN, SHPLIMT, DELVDSR, BTRFSTC, SUOMKEY, EMSKUYN, EOASNKY, EOASNIT, SHPPLKY, SHPPLIT, BILDATE, TRNCPDT, FNCUSKY, FCNAMLC, TRNCPTM, POSHPDT, POSHPTM, POSHPDY, LOTAT01, LOTAT02, LOTAT03, RCVDCDT, RCVDCTM, RCVDCKY, RCVDCIT, STLOTNB,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) SELECT
#{param.warekey} AS WAREKEY, #{param.vhplnky} VHPLNKY, ${userInfo.schema}.FN_TM_VHPLNIT(#{param.vhplnky}) AS FN_TM_VHPLNIT,
WST.CUSTCOD, WST.CUSTNAM, 0, 'INVCMP', '', WST.OWNERKY, WST.OWNRNAM, WST.SKUMKEY, WST.SKUDESC, 1, 1, WST.REGIORG, WST.REGIMOD, WST.DESTORG, WST.DEORGNM, WST.DESTMOD, WST.DEMODNM, WST.DEMDMAN, WST.DEMPOCD, WST.DEMDADR, WST.DEMDTLN, WST.ITEMCOD, WST.SKUGRKY, WST.SKUTHIC, WST.SKUWIDT, WST.SKULENG, WST.SKUWEIG, WST.GROSSWD, WST.GROSSLN, WST.GROSSTH, WST.STKMEMO, WST.GROSSWG, WST.ADDCOKY, WST.BTRCATE, WST.PURCNUM, WST.ORDERLN, WST.SHPLIMT, WST.DELVDSR, WST.BTRFSTC, WST.SUOMKEY, WST.EMSKUYN, '', 0, '', 0, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS BILDATE, '', WST.FNCUSKY, WST.FCNAMLC, '', WST.POSHPDT, WST.POSHPTM, WST.POSHPDY, WST.LOTAT01, WST.LOTAT02, WST.LOTAT03, WST.RCVDCDT, WST.RCVDCTM, WST.RCVDCKY, WST.RCVDCIT, WST.STLOTNB,
date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS CREDATE, date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') AS CRETIME, #{userInfo.useract} AS CREUSER, date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') AS LMODATE, date_format(now(), '%H%i%s') AS LMOTIME, #{userInfo.useract} AS LMOUSER FROM ${userInfo.schema}.WSTKKY WST WHERE WST.WAREKEY = #{sku.warekey} AND WST.SKUMKEY = #{sku.skumkey}
